prompt: Create a high-fashion runway photograph of a tall, slender female model with a softly blurred, non-identifiable face walking confidently down a polished marble catwalk inside an ornate historic palace hall. She wears a dramatic couture ensemble: a wide-brim black hat with a black floral applique on one side, a structured metallic slate gray leather trench coat with a high popped collar, sharp tailored shoulders, fitted waist, black textured cuffs and side panels, and a large black jeweled floral embellishment at the waist. The long coat is open in motion, revealing a luminous ivory satin interior and slim glossy black leather trousers, paired with knee-high black leather boots and black leather gloves. Capture the coat flaring outward as she strides, emphasizing sweeping fabric movement, luxury materials, and sculptural tailoring. The setting has golden architectural trim, dark stone walls, a large abstract stone sculpture in the background, reflective marble flooring, shallow depth of field, soft runway lighting, realistic editorial fashion photography, full-body frontal composition, centered subject, elegant dramatic mood, ultra-detailed textures, 4:5 vertical aspect ratio.
